ideation: This sequence mimics the act of playfully holding and admiring a delicious roasted chicken leg.  The animation will focus on the right arm, delicately holding the imaginary chicken leg, while the left arm remains relaxed.  I'll use the available joints to create a natural, slightly exaggerated movement to emphasize the playful nature of the interaction. In the first frame, both arms are at rest, positioned at the sides. In the second frame, the right arm moves upward, slightly forward and out from the body. The hand is slightly angled to cradle the imaginary chicken leg. In the third frame, the right arm moves a bit higher, and the hand is angled slightly downward, as if checking the leg's doneness. In the fourth frame, the right arm moves slightly to the side and down, as if the robot is taking a moment to admire the leg. The fifth frame returns the arm to the resting position, ending the sequence. The subtle movements and slight adjustments in arm position create a sense of playful engagement.

frames.beat: both arms rest, waiting for a treat
right arm lifts, cradling a tasty drumstick
the chicken leg is admired, tilted for a closer look
a playful pause, admiring the delicious prize
the arm returns, the chicken leg enjoyed
